# `api.lookup.get_job_statuses`

> `GET /lookup/jobStatuses` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.lookup.get_job_statuses() -> list[JobStatus]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab lookup get_job_statuses
```

GET /lookup/jobStatuses

## Response

Returns a list of `List[JobStatus]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[int]` | no | Status ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Status name |
| `description` | `Optional[str]` | no | Description |
| `key` | `Optional[str]` | no | Status key |
| `value` | `Optional[str]` | no | Status value |
